project_context.goal: Build a premium, startup-like website that attracts students and convinces them to contact/book instantly.
project_context.target_audience: College students (18-24 years) looking for PG accommodation near Galgotias University and NIU University.
project_context.constraints: React frontend, FastAPI backend (Resend for emails), Mobile-first, fast loading.

theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast)
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: A premium student housing brand needs to feel modern, safe, and highly approachable to Gen Z. Using a clean startup-like aesthetic (high-contrast text, clear structural grids) combined with soft, rounded elements (Gen Z approachability) establishes immediate trust and desire.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter text-balance
rules.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-balance

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8 to p-16) for sections. Bento grid layout for features to avoid traditional boring rows.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Rounded elements everywhere to match Gen Z aesthetic. Cards use rounded-3xl, Buttons rounded-full.

components.navbar: Sticky, top-0, z-50. Glassmorphism effect: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 (dark: bg-neutral-900/70) with a subtle bottom border border-border/40. Links visible on desktop, hamburger on mobile.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary_hover rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-semibold shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(37,99,235,0.24)] transition-all hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-[#059669] rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-semibold shadow-lg transition-all hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.outline: border-2 border-border hover:border-foreground rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-semibold transition-all hover:-translate-y-1

components.cards: Neumorphic/Soft UI approach. bg-surface, rounded-3xl, shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] (light mode) or border border-border (dark mode). generous internal padding p-8.
components.whatsapp_float: Fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-2xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer.

animations.scroll: Use framer-motion for subtle fade-in-up (initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}) on scroll.
animations.hover: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-2) and increase shadow on hover.
animations.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for a subtle 'Editorial Ribbon' of key highlights (e.g., '24/7 Power • High-Speed WiFi • Premium Food') passing smoothly.

icons.style: Stroke width 2, matched to typography size.

image_urls.description: Abstract geometric background with soft blue and green gradients to be used as hero background section.
High-end 3D isometric render of a modern student room for hero section bento grid.
Premium thali food photography for the Mess/Food section.
Modern bedroom with desk - Gallery / Room Cards.
Modern bedroom with a desk setup.
Students hanging out and laughing - About Us or Community section.

sections_and_functionalities.name: Navigation
sections_and_functionalities.spec: Sticky top bar. Logo on left. Anchor links: Rooms, Amenities, Food, Gallery, FAQs. Right side: Theme toggle and 'Book a Visit' primary button.

sections_and_functionalities.name: Hero Section
sections_and_functionalities.spec: Asymmetric Bento grid. Left side: H1 'Premium Student Living, Redefined.', Subtext: 'Baba PG House — 200m from Galgotias & NIU University.', Buttons: 'Book a Visit' (Primary), 'Call Now' (Outline). Right side: Large 3D room asset image floating in a rounded-3xl container.

sections_and_functionalities.name: Key Highlights Marquee
sections_and_functionalities.spec: react-fast-marquee containing: '200m to Galgotias ⚡️ High-Speed WiFi ⚡️ 4-Time Premium Meals ⚡️ 24/7 Security & Power ⚡️'. Background muted.

sections_and_functionalities.name: About Section
sections_and_functionalities.spec: Image-text alternating layout. Text explaining the safe, community-driven nature of Baba PG House. Use the 'testimonial_students' image.

sections_and_functionalities.name: Room Types
sections_and_functionalities.spec: Grid of 3 cards (Single, Double, Triple). Each card: Image of room at top, Title, Pricing (Monthly), list of included amenities, and a 'Select Room' button. Add popular badge to 'Double'.

sections_and_functionalities.name: Facilities / Amenities
sections_and_functionalities.spec: Tetris Bento grid (MODE A) with 6-8 items. Use lucide icons. Eg: WiFI, Laundry, AC, Security, Power Backup, Housekeeping.

sections_and_functionalities.name: Food & Mess
sections_and_functionalities.spec: Highlight the '4-time meals'. Use the 'food_mess' image as a stunning visual feature. Overlay a menu sample for the week.

sections_and_functionalities.name: Gallery & Video Placeholder
sections_and_functionalities.spec: Masonry grid of images showing life at PG. Include one large block acting as a 'Video Tour' placeholder (with a play button overlay).

sections_and_functionalities.name: Location
sections_and_functionalities.spec: Google Maps iframe embed. Address block text with contact info (7290008205, 7290008206).

sections_and_functionalities.name: Testimonials
sections_and_functionalities.spec: 3 column grid of student reviews praising the proximity to NIU/Galgotias and the food quality.

sections_and_functionalities.name: FAQ
sections_and_functionalities.spec: Shadcn Accordion component for common questions (Curfew, Deposit, Guest policy).

sections_and_functionalities.name: Contact / Booking Form
sections_and_functionalities.spec: Clean card using Shadcn Input, Select, Textarea. Fields: Name, Email, Phone, Room Type, Message. Connects to FastAPI -> Resend. Must have data-testid attributes.

sections_and_functionalities.name: Footer
sections_and_functionalities.spec: Large py-24 footer. Big brand text 'BABA PG HOUSE'. Links. Copyright.

instructions_to_main_agent.tech_stack: React (Vite/Next), TailwindCSS, Shadcn UI, Framer Motion, Lucide Icons. FastAPI backend.
instructions_to_main_agent.fonts: Import 'Outfit' and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' from Google Fonts in index.css.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, nav links, form inputs) MUST have kebab-case data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='book-visit-button').
instructions_to_main_agent.theme: Use a robust ThemeProvider for light/dark mode. Ensure all custom colors use CSS variables to support the toggle seamlessly.
instructions_to_main_agent.backend_integration: Set up a FastAPI route (e.g., /api/contact) that takes the booking form data and triggers an email via Resend API. The frontend must hit this API.
instructions_to_main_agent.components_to_install: accordion, button, card, input, textarea, select, form (if using react-hook-form), toast (for form success).
